questions.question: According to the FAQ, what is the GAAP depreciable life in years for land improvements?
What phone number is listed in the contact information for Clint Baldeo, the Regional Accounting Manager for New York City?
Which firm is listed as the Equity Fund Audit Firm in the Resources section?
Who is listed in the contact information as Vice President, Central Operations?
Which specific utilities appear as line items under Utilities Expenses in the sample Statement of Operations?
In one or two sentences, what is this document and who is its intended audience?
questions.gold: The 2021 Financial Statement Preparation Guide from Enterprise, telling CPAs and sponsors of low-income housing tax credit (LIHTC) limited partnerships how to prepare and submit year-end audited financial statements - deadlines, sample statements and notes, required auditor letters, and impairment analysis guidance.
